requirements: Ensure proper error handling for the whisper CLI command
Add a function to handle errors from the Whisper CLI execution
Check exit codes and provide appropriate error messages
Update the error handling section in transcribe_video.sh to use the updated error handling mechanism

output_examples.name: Error Handling Example
output_examples.description: Example of proper error handling for CLI commands
output_examples.content:
# Error handling for CLI commands
handle_cli_error() {
  local cmd_name=$1
  local exit_code=$2
  local error_msg=$3
  
  if [ $exit_code -ne 0 ]; then
    echo "Error: ${cmd_name} failed with exit code ${exit_code}" >&2
    [ -n "${error_msg}" ] && echo "${error_msg}" >&2
    return $exit_code
  fi
  return 0
}

# Example usage
run_whisper() {
  local input_file=$1
  shift
  ${WHISPER_CLI_PATH} "${input_file}" $@
  handle_cli_error "Whisper CLI" $? "Failed to process audio file ${input_file}"
}
